title: Pouvoirs allemands
text_preview: Whereas, for the better treating of and arranging certain matters wnich are now in discussion, or which may come into discussion, between the Government of the United Kingdom of Creat Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the French Republic and the Government of the Federal Republic of Germany relative to amendments to the Convention concerning the Construccion and Operation of a Very High Flux Reactor…

pages.text:
Whereas, for the better treating of and

arranging

certain matters wnich are now in

discussion, or which may come into discussion, between the Government of the United Kingdom of

Creat Britain and Northern Ireland and the

Government of

the French Republic and the

Government of the Federal Republic of Germany relative

to amendments to the Convention

concerning the Construccion and Operation of a

Very High Flux Reactor of 19 January, 1967, as previously amended, it is expedient that a fit person should be invested with Full Power to conduct the said discussion on the part of the

Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland: I, Charles Anthony Raven

Crosland,

a Member of Her Majesty's Most

Honourable Privy Council, etc., etc.,

Her

Majesty's Principal Secretary of State for Foreign and Conmonwealth Affairs, do hereby certify that

Sir John Nicholas Henderson, Knight Commander of the Most Distinguished Order of Saint Michael and

Saint

George,

Her

Majesty's Ambassador

Extraordinary

Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary at Paris, is by these Presents named, constituted and appointed as

Plenipotentiary and Representative having Full

Power and Authority to agree and conclude with such Plenipotentiaries and Representatives as may be vested with similar Power and Authority on the part of

the Governments aforesaid any Treaty,

Convention,

Agreement,

Protocol or other

Instrument that may tend to the attainment of the above-mentioned end, and

to sign for the

Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland everything so agreed upon and concluded.

Further, I do hereby certify that

whatever chings

shall be so transacted

and

concluded by the said Plenipotentiary and

Representative subject If necessary

SCO

Ratificacion by the Government of the United

Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland, be agreed to, acknowledged and accepted by the said

Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain

and Northern Ireland in the fullest manner.

In witness: whereof I have signed these

Presents and affixed hereto my Seal.

Signed and sealed at the Foreign and

Commonwealth Office, London, the Iwelfth day of

July, One thousand Nine hundred and Seventy-six.

A. Carla
